Notice Of Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds After Foreclosure
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: "CLAIMANT BERTRICA ZENN et al" Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds After Foreclosure Sale Of Real Property At 206 Bosworth Street, San Francisco, California:
APPEAR: Arnold I. Weber, Esq. 398-4670 for moving party; Elizabeth D. "BX" Long, Esq. 693-9315 for claimant Ginale Garcia.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO DISTRIBUTE SURPLUS FUNDS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED). Order signed in open court (before funds distributed, counsel to present by further motion specific dollar figures to be received by all persons (see order at length)). (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780

Notice Of Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds After Foreclosure
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Continued To Jan-07-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CLAIMANTS Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds After Foreclosure Sale Of Real Property At 206 Bosworth Street, San Francisco, California:
APPEAR: Arnold I. Weber, Esq. 398-4670 for all claimants & moving parties except Ginale Garcia; Elizabeth D. Long, Esq. 693-9315 for Ginale Garcia; Wallace Johnson, respondent & opposing party in pro per.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 01/07/03 for Mr. Johnson to obtain counsel and file opposition by 12/31; reply, if any, due 01/03; service by fax or personally. (302/AJR/ju) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
